data.title: Add Figma collaboration mode to design-wireframe SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Modify `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md` to add Figma collaboration support, gated on `design.figma_collaboration` config flag.

### Changes to SKILL.md

1. **Startup config check** (after Stack Adapter Resolution section):
   Add: `FIGMA_COLLABORATION=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" design.figma_collaboration)`
   When absent or not "true", skip all Figma-specific logic.

2. **Figma SVG generation** (conditional section before Step 13):
   When Figma mode is enabled, augment Step 13 SVG generation with:
   - Semantic `<g id="...">` group names matching spatial-layout.json component IDs
   - Inline styles (no external stylesheets or <style> blocks)
   - Valid SVG 1.1 structure (proper DOCTYPE, namespace)
   - Element IDs on all interactive/labeled elements matching JSON component IDs

3. **Post-Step-15 Figma finalization** (new section after manifest assembly):
   When Figma mode is enabled:
   - designs/{uuid}/ directory already exists from normal flow
   - Add `.gitignore` entry: `*.png` to prevent revision PNGs from bloating VCS
   - Source tag constants: `source plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf`
   - Tag story: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket edit <story-id> --tags=$TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT`
     (Note: ticket-edit --tags= is full replacement — use read-modify-write to preserve existing tags)
   - Add instructions comment: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "Import designs/{uuid}/wireframe.svg into Figma. After the designer revises, export a PNG of the revised design to designs/{uuid}/figma-revision.png and run the approval command."`

4. **Existing ID-linkage checkpoint** (line ~673):
   When Figma mode is enabled, add additional validation:
   - Verify all SVG `<g>` elements have semantic names (not auto-generated)
   - Verify inline styles are present (no external stylesheet references)

### Files to modify
- Modify: `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md`

## TDD Requirement

After modification, run `.claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md` — the Figma eval test case from task 2994-16f0 must now PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md checks design.figma_collaboration config at startup
  Verify: grep -q 'design.figma_collaboration' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md Step 13 conditional includes Figma SVG requirements
  Verify: grep -q 'Figma.*SVG\|SVG.*Figma' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes semantic group name requirement matching spatial-layout.json
  Verify: grep -q 'spatial-layout.json' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes inline styles requirement
  Verify: grep -q 'inline.*style\|style.*inline' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes directory creation and .gitignore for *.png
  Verify: grep -q 'gitignore.*png\|png.*gitignore' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes tagging with design:awaiting_import
  Verify: grep -q 'awaiting_import\|TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references shared constants file
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] run-skill-evals.sh passes (exit 0) — Figma eval test is GREEN
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] Non-Figma path is unaffected (no Figma instructions when flag is absent)
  Verify: echo "Verified by eval test case for non-Figma scenario"
